title: blechnum spinulosum
intro: Blechnum spinulosum, also known as spiny wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum spinulosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Blechnum spinulosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further research.
